Title: Turner, Thomas Hudson
Overview: Architectural historian, wrote Some Account of Domestic Architecture in England, later completed by John Henry Parker.
Selected Bibliography: Some Account of Domestic Architecture in England: from the Conquest to the End of the Thirteenth Century. Oxford/London: J. H. Parker, 1851. [continued by John Henry Parker in his, Some Account of Domestic Architecture in England, from Edward I to Richard II [etc.] Oxford, 1853.]
